creator: oleg.nauman@gmail.com
text:
Today I faced the same issue when was trying to install seamonkey from
ports using clang as compiler . seamonkey depends on
textproc/py-libxml2 which emits the same error during the configure
stage.
Please try attached patch for land/python27 ( just place this patch
into files subdirectory ) and reinstall python27
It fixes the issue with 'cc1: error: invalid option argument
'-OPT:Olimit=0' for me.
It is rather hack of course.
